info.title: daily.dev Public API
info.description: API for AI agents and automation to access daily.dev data. Requires a Plus subscription.

content.description: Content of the post (available for freeform, collection, and welcome posts)

vote.description: User's vote on the comment (-1, 0, or 1)

numAwards.description: Total number of awards on this comment

get.description: Get feed with trending and popular posts

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

get.description: Get feed of posts with discussions

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Number of days to look back (1-30)

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time range filter (day, week, month, year, all)

postIds.description: Array of post IDs to bookmark (1-100)

listId.description: Optional bookmark list ID to add posts to (Plus users only). If not provided, Plus users get "last used list" behavior. Non-Plus users: this parameter is ignored.

patch.description: Move a bookmark to a list or remove from list (Plus users only)

listId.description: Target bookmark list ID. Set to null or omit to remove from list.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Post ID of the bookmark to move

get.description: Get all available advanced settings that can be configured for custom feeds

id.description: Setting ID to use when updating feed

orderBy.description: Sort order for the feed (defaults to algorithmic ranking if not provided)

disableEngagementFilter.description: Disable engagement filter (when true, shows posts the user already clicked or saw in the feed)

orderBy.description: Sort order for the feed (defaults to algorithmic ranking if not provided)

disableEngagementFilter.description: Disable engagement filter (when true, shows posts the user already clicked or saw in the feed)

patch.description: Update custom feed advanced settings. Use GET /feeds/custom/advanced-settings to see available settings.

id.description: Setting ID (see GET /feeds/custom/advanced-settings for available IDs)

get.description: Get global feed settings (For You feed)

post.description: Follow tags for a custom feed
Unfollow tags for a custom feed
Block tags for a custom feed
Unblock tags for a custom feed
Follow sources for a custom feed
Unfollow sources for a custom feed
Block sources for a custom feed
Unblock sources for a custom feed

url.description: Full URL to the social profile

socialLinks.description: Social media links (replaces all existing links). Platform auto-detected from URL if not provided.

post.description: Add a tool to user stack

title.description: Tool title (must match an existing tool)

section.description: Stack section (primary, hobby, learning, past, custom)

startedAt.description: When the user started using this tool

section.description: Stack section (primary, hobby, learning, past, custom)

startedAt.description: When the user started using this tool

delete.description: Remove a tool from user stack

get.description: Get current user's experiences (work, education, etc.)

customCompanyName.description: Custom company/organization name if not in database

locationType.description: Location type: ONSITE, REMOTE, HYBRID (work only)

employmentType.description: Employment type: FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACT, etc. (work only)

get.description: Get a specific experience by ID

customCompanyName.description: Custom company/organization name if not in database

locationType.description: Location type: ONSITE, REMOTE, HYBRID (work only)

employmentType.description: Employment type: FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACT, etc. (work only)

get.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Recommend articles by keyword search. Best when the query contains specific technical terms (e.g. "RAG", "pgvector", "LangChain"). Returns posts with engagement signals for LLM consumption. This endpoint may be removed or changed without notice.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query — keywords or technical terms (e.g. "RAG vs fine-tuning", "vector database comparison")

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of articles to return (1-20, default 10). Kept small for LLM context efficiency.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time range filter — use "month" or "year" for recent content, "all" for comprehensive results

get.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Recommend articles by semantic search. Uses AI-powered matching to find articles for natural language questions. Better for non-technical queries like "how do I make my chatbot remember things?" This endpoint may be removed or changed without notice.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Natural language question or topic (e.g. "how do I make my chatbot remember previous conversations?", "what is the best way to handle authentication in a Next.js app?")

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of articles to return (1-20, default 10). Kept small for LLM context efficiency.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time range filter — use "month" or "year" for recent content, "all" for comprehensive results
